Roadmap implication: Include privacy, consent, security, access control, and stewardship in the conceptual framework.
Define accountability, fairness, transparency, liability, and regulatory pathways.
Treat scalable, reproducible computational environments as translational infrastructure.
Use implementation profiles and shared semantics to reduce fragmented integration.
Evaluate clinician trust, workflow fit, implementation burden, and workforce needs.
Prioritize longitudinal, multimodal, harmonized, representative datasets.
Make prospective validation, benchmarks, uncertainty, and reproducibility core requirements.
